title: dorcoceras rufescens
intro: Dorcoceras rufescens, also known as the Red-flowered Dorcoceras, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of coughs and respiratory issues, where the plant's expectorant and antitussive properties help to relieve congestion and soothe the throat. The health benefits of Dorcoceras rufescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and ease symptoms associated with colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
